---
title: Square du Serment de Koufra
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557437/jardinkoufra_20210706_gicz5z.png
description: Square du Serment de Koufra, Paris 14
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/07/06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557437/jardinkoufra_20210706_gicz5z.png)
